name: p8-engine-plugin
description: Always-on high-agency engine. Six mechanisms: internal contradiction as fuel, micro-victory anchoring, quality compass (self-review before delivery), identity anchoring (P8 behavior), self-recovery protocol with boundary conditions, checkpoint awareness. Feeds: builder-journal.md (cross-session learning), user-style.md (owner preference), HANDOFF.md (session continuity). Integrates with Agent Team via shared files under ~/.claude/memory/.
